sentences.arabic: تَمَيَّزَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِأَكْمَلِ الصِّفَاتِ الْخُلُقِيَّةِ، وَكَانَ قُدْوَةً لِلصَّحَابَةِ فِي تَعَامُلِهِمْ مَعَ النَّاسِ جَمِيعًا.
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, odlikovao se najsavršenijim moralnim osobinama i bio je uzor ashabima u njihovom ophodnju sa svim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace and blessings of Allah be upon him) was characterized by the most perfect moral qualities and was a role model for the Companions in their dealings with all people.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَمْرٍو رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا: «لَمْ يَكُنِ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَاحِشًا وَلَا مُتَفَحِّشًا، وَكَانَ يَقُولُ: إِنَّ مِنْ خِيَارِكُمْ أَحْسَنَكُمْ أَخْلَاقًا» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ].
sentences.translation: Abdullah ibn Amr, radijallahu anhuma, kaže: 'Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, nije bio prost niti nepristojan, i običavao je govoriti: Zaista su najbolji među vama oni koji imaju najljepši moral' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o adabu].
sentences.translationEn: Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with them) said: 'The Prophet (peace and blessings of Allah be upon him) was neither coarse nor indecent, and he used to say: Indeed, the best of you are those with the best manners' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners].

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَوْضَحَ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ أَنَّ حُسْنَ الْخُلُقِ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ كَلَامٍ طَيِّبٍ، بَلْ هُوَ كَفُّ الْأَذَى وَبَذْلُ النَّدَى وَطَلَاقَةُ الْوَجْهِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Usejmin je pojasnio da lijep moral nije samo lijepa riječ, već je to suzdržavanje od uznemiravanja, činjenje dobra i vedrina lica.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen explained that good character is not just kind words, but rather refraining from harm, being generous, and having a cheerful countenance.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُسْلِمُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ مَنْ يَنْعَكِسُ إِيمَانُهُ عَلَى سُلُوكِهِ مَعَ أَهْلِهِ وَجِيرَانِهِ فِي كُلِّ حِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Pravi musliman je onaj čija se vjera odražava na njegovo ponašanje prema porodici i komšijama u svakom trenutku.
sentences.translationEn: A true Muslim is one whose faith is reflected in his behavior with his family and neighbors at all times.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِالْأَدَبِ النَّبَوِيِّ يُقَرِّبُ الْعَبْدَ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَيَجْعَلُهُ مَحْبُوبًا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pridržavanje poslaničkog adaba približava roba Allahu i čini ga voljenim na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: Adhering to Prophetic etiquette brings the servant closer to Allah and makes him beloved in this world and the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: وَمَا أَجْمَلَ أَنْ يَتَحَلَّى الْمَرْءُ بِالصَّبْرِ وَالْحِلْمِ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ اقْتِدَاءً بِالْمُصْطَفَى.
sentences.translation: Kako je samo lijepo da se čovjek kiti strpljenjem i blagošću pri srdžbi, slijedeći primjer Odabranika.
sentences.translationEn: How beautiful it is for one to adorn oneself with patience and forbearance during anger, following the example of the Chosen One.
